template.homepage.siteName.desc: Displayed in browser title bar, RSS feed, and page header.
template.homepage.siteUrl.desc: Public URL of your blog. Used for SEO, RSS, sitemap, and canonical links.
template.homepage.layout.desc: Controls how posts are displayed on the homepage.
template.homepage.layout.option.cover.de: Full-width hero section with recent posts below
template.homepage.layout.option.cards.de: Masonry card grid with no sidebar
template.appearance.colorScheme.desc: Default color mode for visitors. 'Follow' respects the visitor's system preference.
template.appearance.accentColor.desc: Primary accent color for links, buttons, and highlights.
template.appearance.fontFamily.desc: Base font for body text and headings.
template.appearance.siteLanguage.desc: Locale for date formatting and UI text. 'Follow' uses the visitor's browser language.
template.appearance.background.desc: Full-page background image with overlay. Managed via the Background Editor modal.
template.appearance.backgroundMeta.desc: Serialized background display parameters (mode, position, blur, overlay).
template.appearance.backgroundCompressio: Image compression factor. Lower = better quality, higher = smaller file.
template.features.rss.desc: Generate RSS/Atom feed for readers to subscribe.
template.features.gaId.desc: Google Analytics 4 Measurement ID (e.g. G-XXXXXXXXXX). Leave empty to disable.
template.collections.name: Collection Name
template.collections.description.desc: Short description shown on the collection landing page.
template.collections.cover.desc: Collection cover image. Supports external URL or local file from site/assets/.
template.collections.nodes.desc: Posts and sub-groups in this collection. Order determines display sequence.
template.collections.node.postId.desc: UUID or slug of the post.
template.collections.node.children.desc: Posts and sub-groups nested under this group.
template.friends.globalStyle.desc: Default layout style for all friend cards.
template.friends.card.name: Name
template.friends.card.name.desc: Display name of the friend or blog.
template.friends.card.avatar.desc: Avatar image. Supports external URL or local file from site/assets/.
template.friends.card.intro.desc: A short description shown on the card.
template.friends.card.storyPost.desc: Optional post ID for a dedicated story page about this friend.
template.about.name: Display Name
template.about.name.desc: Your name as shown on the blog.
template.about.avatar.desc: Profile picture. Leave empty to auto-detect site/avatar.* during build. Supports external URL or local file.
template.about.bio.desc: A short introduction shown on the homepage card.
template.about.location.desc: Optional location shown on the profile card.
template.about.links.desc: Links to your social media, GitHub, email, etc.
template.about.link.label: Label
template.about.link.url.desc: Link URL. Supports https://, mailto:, and other schemes.
